creator: greinbold@nosheep.fr
text:
Hello

After building the latest version of Qt library from ports with poudriere, dsbautostart crash at launch:

[@elitebook ~]$ dsbautostart
Cannot mix incompatible Qt library (version 0x50d02) with this library (version 0x50e02)
Abort trap

[@elitebook ~]$ date; uname -a
mar. 21 avr. 2020 14:49:13 CEST
FreeBSD elitebook 12.1-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p3 GENERIC  amd64

[@elitebook ~]$ grep qt /var/log/messages
Apr 21 11:09:23 elitebook pkg[7961]: qt5-core upgraded: 5.13.2_2 -> 5.14.2_1
